onboarding.advanced_description:
More settings on screen.
For those who want to control everything.
onboarding.beginner_description:
Simple interface. Mouse control.
Perfect for first-time users.

button.info:
LMB: Rotate | Wheel: Width
RMB: Color | MMB: Reset

onboarding.expert_description:
Minimalism. Keyboard control (WASD, QE).
Maximum space for images.
onboarding.magnifier_controls_hint: Use WASD and QE to control the magnifier
onboarding.mode_hint: UI mode can always be changed in settings
